🔧
Solution & Innovation Provider

Do you sell B2B solutions to the agri-food sector? You know how hard it is to stand out in a crowded market and generate qualified contacts with decision-makers.

→ Become top of mind in the sector and generate profiled leads ready to discover your solution.

Vertical brand awareness

Positioning as an Innovation Provider in Italy's largest agri-food community

B2B lead generation

Access to an opt-in contact list of targeted participants with complete profiles

Thought leadership

Speaking slot (pitch, panel, workshop) to showcase your expertise

Multi-channel visibility

Logo, mentions, LinkedIn posts (27K followers), newsletter (13.5K subscribers)

📌 Real use case

An ingredients distributor sponsored the 2025 edition. Result: over 500 participants at the presentation session, dozens of qualified leads.

Configure your package →
🏭
Food & Beverage Companies

Want to communicate your company's innovation? Traditional channels don't reach the technical, vertical community you need.

→ Position yourself as a leader and attract strategic partnerships, talent, and visibility in the sector.

Thought leadership

Share case studies on innovation, sustainability, digitalization, and nutrition

Strategic partnerships

Matching with innovative startups, research centres, and technology providers

Employer & innovation branding

Positioning as an innovative and attractive company

Reusable content

Videos, clips, articles, social posts reusable for 12 months

Configure your package →
🔬
EU Research Projects & R&D Organisations

Do you have dissemination obligations for EU projects? You know how hard it is to reach a qualified audience and demonstrate communicable impact.

→ Maximise the reach and impact of your project with a vertical audience and clear reporting.

Qualified dissemination

Audience of 5,000+ registered agri-food stakeholders (companies, startups, research)

Facilitated exploitation

Direct matching with companies interested in adopting your results

Full reporting

Participation data, engagement, leads generated for EU reporting

Multi-channel visibility

Newsletter 13.5K, LinkedIn 27K, on-demand content for 12+ months

Configure your package →
The Festival

Event Structure & Key Moments

A hybrid journey designed to maximise both visibility and the quality of connections. The Festival gives you the opportunity to present your organisation's innovations to a highly qualified and engaged audience.

Phase 1: Online
🌐

Nov 9–12Visibility & Lead Generation

  • Branding & Reach: Audience of 5,000+ profiled registrants
  • Presentations: Live sessions on a dedicated professional platform
  • Lead Flow: B2B contact generation during talks
Phase 2: In-Person
🤝

November 27, BolognaNetworking & Business Matching

  • Exclusive Meetup: Private in-person event for decision-makers
  • Business Matching: 1:1 sessions and themed working tables
  • Connections: Direct high-value connections
Audience

Who Attends the Festival

Real data based on the 4,120 registrants of the 2025 edition — professionals, companies, research centres, and universities from the agri-food sector.

🎫
4.120 2025 Edition Registrants
💼
2.730+ Active Professionals
🏢
1.140+ Companies Represented

Top Functions Represented

Quality & QA21%
Research & Development17%
Production12%
Sustainability9%
Management & Administration9%
Sales & Commercial8%
Marketing & Communications8%

Professional Experience

Senior (>20 years)28%
Junior-Mid (1–5 years)28%
Mid (6–10 years)17%
Senior-Mid (11–20 years)16%

Companies Represented in 2025

Barilla Ferrero Nestlé Coca-Cola HBC Perfetti Van Melle Parmalat Granarolo Amadori Conserve Italia Mutti Danone Bolton Food Inalca Coop +1,100 others

Industry Sectors

Food Industry Agriculture Consulting & Research Ho.Re.Ca. Machinery & Equipment Animal Husbandry GDO Bevande Logistics

Want to learn more?

Contact us →
In-Person Meetup

Exclusive In-Person Networking

Bologna — November 27, 2026 · Max 200 selected attendees. The day is structured around 3 moments: presentations from top-level industry players, a networking lunch, and themed discussion tables.

🎯 Qualified Selection

  • Max 200 attendees
  • Decision-makers, founders, innovators
  • Pre-event matching with target profiles

🤝 Networking Format

  • Structured business matching
  • Themed roundtables
  • Networking lunch

Extra benefits for sponsors

  • Logo on event materials
  • "Sponsor" badge
  • Facilitated introductions with 5 attendees
Benefits

What You Get as a Sponsor

Concrete, measurable benefits for every type of organisation.

01

Vertical Positioning

Become the go-to reference on your topics in front of a technical, qualified agri-food audience

02

Profiled lead generation

Generate trackable contacts through opt-in registration mechanics and gated content

03

Commercial opportunities

Activate matching and connections with target stakeholders (companies, research, startups)

04

Thought leadership

Your talks become reusable assets: video clips, articles, newsletters

05

Employer branding

Visibility to attract talent, technology partners, and new projects

06

Measurable ROI

Post-event report with participation data, engagement, and leads generated

Build Your Custom Sponsorship

No fixed packages — a modular, flexible system. Select only what you need.

Activations

Assets & Touchpoints for Your Sponsorship

All the tools available to maximise the return on your investment.

📢
Visibility
  • Logo on event page, agenda, emails
  • "Supported by" mentions
  • Pre-event banner/slides
📧
Newsletter & Social
  • Newsletter mention (13.5K+)
  • LinkedIn post (27K+ followers)
  • Instagram Stories (13.5K+)
🎤
Thought Leadership
  • Speaking slot (pitch, talk, panel)
  • Case study written by Food Hub
  • Manager video interview
📹
On-Demand Content
  • Recordings available 12+ months
  • Highlight video clips for reuse
  • Blog article + SEO
🤝
Business Matching
  • 1:1 sessions with target stakeholders
  • Access to networking platform
  • Facilitated intro by Food Hub
🏢
Bologna Meetup
  • Access to high-level presentations
  • Participation in themed tables
📊
Leads & Data
  • Opt-in participant contact list
  • Full profile with interests
  • Post-event analytics report
📈
Reporting & ROI
  • Real-time engagement dashboard
  • Final KPI report
  • Certificate for EU projects
Track Record

Chosen by the Leaders of Agri-Food Innovation

The Festival is in its fifth edition and has built a solid reputation as the reference event.

"I would like to express my appreciation for the collaboration with Food Hub — an operator that stands out in the Italian agri-food tech sector for its combination of scientific expertise, connections to the international academic world, and industry-level dissemination. I particularly appreciated your ability to make technical information accessible even to less specialised operators, thus facilitating understanding and engagement across the entire agri-food ecosystem."
Claudia Berti
Head of Open Innovation @ ex-Barilla
"The combination of scientific and technical expertise, a focus on innovation, and up-to-date multichannel communication skills makes Food Hub a distinctive player in Italian technical-scientific communication. For this reason, we are pleased to recommend them for the development of communication activities, event organisation, and generating contact opportunities with potential target users."
Daniele Panfiglio
Managing Director, COMSOL Srl
"I would recommend Food Hub to other organisations for their professionalism, deep sector knowledge, and collaborative approach. Their ability to create effective content and promote initiatives in a targeted way has had a tangible impact on our visibility and community engagement. Furthermore, their expertise in identifying and disseminating funding opportunities has enabled us to seize important occasions for the organisations that turn to the Tecnopolo."
Annalisa Campana
Manager, Tecnopolo di Forlì-Cesena

Supported by (2025 Edition)

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

The Festival takes place primarily online on a dedicated platform (Nov 9–12, 2026), with content available live and on-demand for 12+ months. Partners also have access to the in-person Food Hub Community Meetup in Bologna (November 2026, max 200 selected attendees).

The audience consists of agri-food professionals: quality managers, R&D, marketing, sales, food technologists, innovation managers, sustainability managers. Represented companies include producers, large-scale retailers, cooperatives, tech suppliers, startups, and research centres.

Yes! Packages include speaking slots where you can present case studies, product demos, best practices, and applied research. The format is flexible: pitch, panel, workshop, keynote. Every sponsor has at least one 30-minute slot included.

Generated leads are opt-in contacts from participants who have explicitly agreed to be contacted. You receive a list including: first name, last name, role, company, email, phone, and declared interests. All fully GDPR-compliant.

Sponsor promotion begins in March 2026. To maximise visibility, we recommend confirming by February 2026. Last-minute sponsorships are possible but come with reduced visibility.

Absolutely! Use the configurator above to build your custom modular package, or request a call to discuss specific needs. Mix and match freely: visibility, thought leadership, lead generation, in-person networking.

Yes. All sponsors receive a post-event report including: number of participants, content views, social post engagement, leads generated, and platform analytics. EU project sponsors also receive a participation certificate and data useful for EU reporting.

Yes! All content (videos, clips, articles, social posts) is reusable for 12+ months. Recordings remain available on-demand on the Food Hub platform.
